title: Process Signals, Abort Trees, Listener Cleanup, and Graceful Shutdown · Compiler Case: Pokedex Ts Graceful Close Order
summary: Every request owns an unrelated controller, SIGINT calls process.exit immediately, event listeners accumulate, pending readline and fetch work survive close, and aborted work prints as a defect. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts graceful close order increment in composed abort-aware Node session lifecycle. Learners progress…
objectives: Stop admission, abort pending questions and fetches, await owned work, persist valid state if policy allows, close readline, then set exit status.
Use once or signal-bound listeners, remove handlers on completion, and prove no listener-count growth across commands.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
